description_long: This is a traditional wooden street food kiosk with a gabled, shingled roof and decorative latticework panels. The kiosk features a wide serving counter at the front, with various small bowls, chopsticks, and food items displayed. Red paper lanterns hang from the roof corners, adding a festive and inviting touch. The structure is mounted on two large wooden wheels, suggesting it is a mobile cart. The roof has a weathered, rustic appearance, and the side panels extend outward to provide additional workspace. The interior contains cooking equipment and utensils, visible through the open serving window.
description: A rustic wooden street food kiosk with a gabled roof, decorative latticework, red lanterns, and large wheels for mobility. The front counter displays food items and utensils, evoking a traditional, festive atmosphere.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main serving counter with bowls, chopsticks, and a red lantern hanging on the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large wooden wheel, extended side counter, and a red lantern on the right.
description_view_2: Rear view with a clear look at the latticework, serving window, and small food containers on the counter.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other wheel, cooking equipment inside, and another red lantern.
attribute_window_presence: one large rectangular serving window at the front
attribute_roof_design: gabled roof with overlapping wooden shingles and slight overhangs
